name: Easy Meatball Paprikash
recipeIngredient: 1 lb lean ground pork or veal
1 large green bell pepper, cored, seeded and cut into 1-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine pork, egg, bread crumbs, salt, and caraway seeds. Blend well with hands or wooden spoon.
2. Shape into 1 1/2-inch balls.
3. Heat oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium-high heat. Add meatballs; cook about 12 minutes, turning frequently until browned on all sides.
4. Using a slotted spoon, remove meatballs to a plate.
5. In the drippings, add onion, green pepper, and paprika; cook still over medium-high heat for 5 minutes, stirring frequently until vegetables are crisp-tender and well coated with paprika.
6. Return meatballs to skillet along with tomatoes and their liquid and remaining salt.
7. Increase heat to high; bring to boil.
8. Reduce heat to low; simmer, covered, for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until meatballs are cooked through.
9. Meanwhile, prepare noodles according to package directions.
10. Stir sour cream into meatball mixture; remove from heat.
11. Spoon meatballs onto a serving platter. Drain noodles; toss with chopped parsley. Arrange on the platter with meatballs. Makes 4 servings.
